fields.description: The blocked subdomain label (lowercase), beyond the structural RESERVED_SUBDOMAINS frozen in code. Brand/keyword names a tenant could grab under the valid wildcard cert (paypal, stripe, login, account, ...). The autoname source; unique fleet-wide. The next register/check_label honors a new row immediately — no deploy, no migrate.
fields.label: Label

fields.description: Flip off to lift a block without losing the row (and its reason). A disabled row is ignored by the enforcement query.
fields.label: Enabled

fields.description: Operator note on why this label is blocked: "payment brand", "auth keyword", "abused in audit log", ...
fields.label: Reason
